validated.description: Repo has observed surface evidence, fixture coverage, rollback notes, and validation command coverage.

repo-present-validation-required.description: Repo has paths, manifests, generated artifacts, or sync entries, but needs fixture-backed validation before support is presented as complete.

planned-research-backed.description: Surface is backed by user intent, planning research, or external evidence, but local support is not verified.

experimental.description: Surface exists or is requested, but behavior is unstable, incomplete, or mostly a blind spot.

unverified.description: Surface is mentioned but not yet grounded in repo files, first-party docs, or fixtures.

unsupported.description: Surface is intentionally not projected by this repository.

quarantine.description: Surface touches credential reuse, auth bridging, proxying, offensive tooling, or other high-risk behavior requiring security-lane approval.

rules: A surface cannot be marked validated without fixture evidence and rollback coverage.
Experimental and planned surfaces must not appear as supported in generated install commands.
Quarantine surfaces require security-lane approval before any promotion or default enablement.
Generated docs must preserve the exact tier vocabulary from this registry.
